message:
fix(test): use localStorage mock from setup.ts instead of Storage.prototype spy (#10920)

The global test setup replaces window.localStorage with a plain object mock,
so vi.spyOn(Storage.prototype, 'getItem') was targeting an unused prototype.
Use localStorage.setItem/clear directly to interact with the actual mock.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
